text:
RESO measure is included in the Quality Composite Score
I_CAHPS_SCORE_SPEC Include CAHPS SPEC in Quality Composite Indicator for whether CAHPS SPEC is included in Quality Composite Score 1439 Num 8 Equals 1 if CAHPS SPEC measure is included in the Quality Composite Score
I_CAHPS_SCORE_STAF Include CAHPS STAF in Quality Composite Indicator for whether CAHPS STAF is included in Quality Composite Score 1440 Num 8 Equals 1 if CAHPS STAF measure is included in the Quality Composite
